title: Brotein git rebase — wrong cwd `not a git repository`, then cd + stage + continue
html:
Continuation of the Brotein merge conflict session — agent ran git add from ~/trailruns24 (wrong dir), got fatal: not a git repository, recovered by cd-ing into /Users/yahirgonzalez/trailruns24/brotein and staging the three ViewModels, then git rebase --continue.

brotein · anthropic claude · xcode · swiftui

related.label: Brotein git merge conflict — Claude resolving 3 ViewModels (Analysis, FoodScanner, NutritionLabel)
